title: Demo: issue anatomy showcase (fixture)
description: A stress-test fixture exercising every issue section at maximum variety — multi-tier notes & brainstorm (including a 5-level-deep nesting demo that hits the loader's hard cap), agent-memory with folders, and all agent-log kinds (loop / audit / refactor / workflow / fast-iteration) as NNN_<name>/ activity folders with the standard six 0NN slots (00_goal / 01_summary / 02_task_list / 03_working / 04_benchmark / 05_notes — showcasing file, folder, filled, and not-applicable forms), plus a trivial flat one-off. Used to eyeball the issues layout with everything populated. Not real work.
author: sidhantha

ex.name: experiment
ex.desc: One-off exploratory spikes — keep or discard.
